zh.lifeSummary: 當Richenza Von Ortenberg於1242年出生時，她的父親Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg33歲，母親Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg32歲。她於1259年與Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 姆爾爾多福 阿姆 音艾爾哈廷洛爾巴賀結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年10月14日享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richenza Von Ortenberg于1242年出生时，她的父亲Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg33岁，母亲Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg32岁。她于1259年与Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 姆爾爾多福 阿姆 音艾爾哈廷洛爾巴賀结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年10月14日享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Ortenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Mendel, Simcha, Aron, Dorith, Dov, Eliezer, Hershel, Meir, Meyer, Moisey, Morry.  German Frieda, Wolfgang, Hilde, Wolf.
German: habitational name from any of numerous places called Rotenberg.

variants.name: Rothenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Chaim, Emanuel, Shlomo, Zvi, Arie, Hadassah, Isadore, Isak, Mort.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of numerous places called Rothenberg.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Rot(en)berg ‘red mountain’.

variants.name: Rotenberry
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German   Rotenberg   or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

en.lifeSummary: When Richenza Von Ortenberg was born in 1242, her father, Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg, was 33 and her mother, Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg, was 32. She married Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV in 1259, in Rohrbach, Erharting, Mühldorf, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 14 October 1309, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richenza Von Ortenberg est née en 1242, son père, Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV en 1259, à Rohrbach, Erharting, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 octobre 1309, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richenza Von Ortenberg 1242 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg 33 und ihre Mutter Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg 32. Sie hat 1259 in Rohrbach, Erharting, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Deutschland Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Oktober 1309 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richenza Von Ortenberg è nata il nel 1242, sua padre, Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV nel 1259, nel Rohrbach, Erharting, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 14 ottobre 1309, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richenza Von Ortenbergが1242年に生まれた時，父Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburgは33歳，母Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburgは32歳であった。1259年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ムuhルドルフ アム インエルハーティングロhルバチでWolfram Von Dörnberg IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年10月14日に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richenza Von Ortenberg(이)가 1242년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1259년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 uh도르프 아 이 에하틴그 로h르바치에서 Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 10월 14일 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richenza Von Ortenberg nasceu em 1242, seu pai, Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV em 1259, em Rohrbach, Erharting, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1309, com 67 anos.

ru.Vohburg, Vohburg an der Donau, Pfaffenho: фохбург ан дир донау, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richenza Von Ortenberg родилась в 1242 г., её отцу по имени Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV в 1259 г. в местности рохрбач, эрартинг, ландкрис мuхлдорф ам инн, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 октября 1309 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richenza Von Ortenberg nació en 1242, su papá, Heinrich II. Graf von Ortenburg, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Princess Richeza of Vohburg and Hohenburg, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV en 1259, en Rohrbach, Erharting, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1309, a la edad de 67 años.
